name: Natsuki Shinomiya
description: __Height:__ 186 cm __Weight:__ 70 kg __Instrument:__ Viola __Hobbies:__ Cooking Another of Haruka's classmate, he plays the viola, though he used to play the violin. He has an extreme fondness for cute things, leading him to take a liking to Haruka. In the anime, upon his first encounter with Haruka he calls her Elizabeth, saying that she reminds him of his dog. She is also quite arrogant, since she has a habit of taunting her opponents. She is also childhood friends with [Akoya Matama](https://anilist.co/character/255890). name: Neuro Nougami
description: The title character of the series, Neuro is a demon detective from hell. He looks for mysteries in the labyrinthine minds of humans for sustenance. When he dismantles the mystery and strips the culprit of all of their defenses, that releases the negative energies that caused the culprit to commit the crime, which he then consumes. He came to the human world in search of the Ultimate Mystery, as all of the mysteries in hell were bland and repetitive. Once in the human world, he forced Yako to be

name: Nijimi Anazawa
description: Nicknamed Nijimin, she is the most popular idol of the idol group 'Inu Asobi' (Puppy Play). Aya and Tsuyuno try to meet her based on a Slaughter Note of wands Rina was carrying. Though her normal demeanor is very perky and friendly, when shown a picture of Rina she becomes very upset and homicidal.

name: Reina Kurashiki
description: __Grade:__ 2-A __Height:__ 171cm A bitchy gyaru who works as a fashion model. Her perfect facial features and fearless personality made her a queen-like presence at all of her schools. Her first time was in fifth grade. She loves handsome guys so much that you could say she picks her boyfriends by their face. She then judges men by the law of substraction starting from there. (*Generally she looks down on men.)

name: Renamon
description: Renamon is tall and powerful for a Rookie level Digimon. She is far more mature than the other Rookie Digimon, considering her experience and her jaded view on life. Renamon's feral features and penetrating icy blue eyes can make her seem quite intimidating, even when she does not mean to give that impression. Renamon's Tamer is Ruki, and is a main character in the Digimon Tamers season (as well as the two related movies Battle of Adventurers and Runaway Locomon).

name: Ruki Irokawa
description: A serialized "Teen's Love" manga artist. She originally wanted to draw cute animal manga for children, but her ability to draw big-breasted women led to her drawing erotic manga.

name: Sol Marron
description: She is a member of Clover Kingdom's Blue Rose squad of the Magic Knights. She is a 3rd Class Intermediate Magic Knight.

name: Tae-Kyung Song
description: **Weight:** 65kg **Height** 180cm A photographer, uses the name “K” for work.

name: Tenka Adachi
description: __Height:__ 145 cm A girl who has recently moved from the city due to her parents' circumstances. She claims she isn't lonely, while in reality she is, and doesn't get along with Chie who often tries to interact with her. Tenka admires idols a lot and thus, comes often to the candy store to buy idol cards. She calls the protagonist "oji-san".

name: Tenri Ayukawa
description: A shy and reticent childhood friend of Keima, who was a former next-door neighbor and classmate until the Katsuragi household relocated seven years ago. name: Vein
description: __Height:__ 187 cm The head of the Yingdu Chinese Chamber of Commerce. He oversees countless businesses and a talent agency, holding extensive connections and intelligence. Beneath his unrestrained exterior lies a sense of strong principle.

name: Yuffie Kisaragi
description: Yuffle is a Ninja and a Thief, wielding a large shuriken. As a rebellious and cocky tomboy, Yuffie desires to restore her homeland Wutai to the glorious nation it was before being conquered by Shinra. Despite her sometimes obnoxious personality, Yuffie is friendly, helpful, and willingly helps the party in their battles. Yuffie has a cocky, proud, brash personality, and at times can be aggressive, a bit of a tomboy and acts unashamedly towards her goals. She has a tendency to bestow honorific ti

name: Yui Kiriyama
description: Yui is very active and expressive. She's a bit small, but she holds ranks in Karate, and even won tournaments when she was in middle school. She absolutely loves cute things, and her room at home is filled with fancy items. She always ends up insulting Aoki when he tries to approach her.

name: Yuuya Mirokuji
description: The main antagonist of the "Exclusive Underground - Dark Night" manga. He is a violent person who enjoys picking fights, though he is shown to have a more calm and laid-back side. He fights using a bokken and can summon a spirit called Hangaku to fight by his side. He is not interested in making his creator alter his world, being fine with the way he is. ~!Though he remains independent at first, he came to the aid of Souta's group against Altair's faction several times and eventually joins them.

name: Zeniba
description: The twin sister of Yu-baaba. Although she looks exactly the same as Yu-baaba, she seems to have a very different personality. She holds the key to the story.

name: Alice Shimada
description: Commander of the Selection University's Sensha-dō team. She's a genius and graduated directly to university without going to high school.

description: Asterope is the Crown Prince of the empire. He goes by "Asher" to avoid telling Aria he's part of the royal family. He first meets Aria when he's in town investigating the casino case and she's retrieving her repaired hourglass. Asher is described as an exceptionally tall young man with short black hair and highly handsome facial features. He has an angled face, pale skin, and ears that redden when embarrassed. name: Azul Ashengrotto
nativeName: アズール・アーシェングロット

With his unique magic, It's A Deal, he is capable of taking someone's magic ability or physical capability should they sign a contract and fail to meet it. name: Charioce XVII
description: He is a calculating king who is willing to resort to any measure as long as it fits his goal. Fearing neither god nor demon, he wields forbidden power stolen from the gods themselves.

name: Chiharu Matsuyamachi
description: He is the main antagonist of the Jagaaaaaan manga and one of the most powerful fractured human warriors seen thus far. He was infected with a frenzied tadpole and became the fractured human warrior "Hidarikki" and got the ability to grow and manipulate wood on his body and met his partner, The Hawk of Paradise Naraku.

name: Chikara Doumeki
description: One of the two main protagonists of Saezuru Tori wa Habatakanai. As a bodyguard, his job is to protect Yashiro, the young yakuza leader of Shinseikai. He has a tall and built appearance, with short brown hair and dark-colored eyes. He rarely shows any expressions in the manga, and is unsure about his own emotions. name: Clen
description: One of the Four Great Demon Beast Kings, he dwells upon the Moon Mountain of the South. He is also known as "Clevatess of the Moonlight." He possesses a massive, jet-black body resembling that of a wolf, with a single long horn protruding from his forehead and seven sharp tails. Deeming that he could not walk the human world while retaining his colossal form, Clevatess assumed a human guise. Fuyuko is first seen as a bubbly and cheerful girl that likes cute things and is attentive to her surroundings. However, her true personality is much more serious, and she acts in a cutesy manner because she believes others will like her more when she does.
